    com.authlete.common.api.AuthleteApi.createServie(Service)
    Use correctly spelled AuthleteApi.createService(Service).

    Since Authlete 2.2. Use Client.getSectorIdentifierUri() instead.

    com.authlete.common.dto.Client.setSectorIdentifier(URI)
    Since Authlete 2.2. Use Client.setSectorIdentifierUri(URI) instead.
